description_long: This fountain features a circular stone basin with a raised central pedestal and a simple, tapered spout at its core. The basin is bordered by a wide, segmented wooden or wood-textured ring, contrasting with the gray stonework. Adjacent to the fountain are two architectural elements: a short stone wall with a wooden vertical accent and a pair of stone columns connected by a wooden beam, possibly serving as a decorative archway or entry feature. The stonework is composed of irregularly shaped blocks, giving a rustic, old-world charm. The fountain's design is minimalistic, with no visible water features or elaborate ornamentation. The overall structure suggests durability and a blend of natural materials suitable for public parks or plazas.
description: A circular stone fountain with a central pedestal and wooden accents, accompanied by a stone wall and columned archway. The design is rustic and minimalistic, with no visible water features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular basin, central spout, stone wall with wood accent, and the columned archway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the stone wall and the depth of the basin, with the archway seen from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the stone wall and the archway, with the fountain partially obscured.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the fountain's basin and spout, as well as the side profile of the wall and archway.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain and its adjacent structures are minimally decorated, featuring rustic stonework with irregular block patterns and simple wooden accents. There are no visible engravings, motifs, or sculptural embellishments.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is circular with a wide, segmented wooden rim and a raised central pedestal supporting a tapered spout. There are no visible tiers or compartments within the basin.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible jets or spray patterns are present on the fountain.
